top_signals.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for May 2026 — in one chart
top_signals.summary: Inflation jumped to a three-year high in May as the Iran war continued to fuel higher energy prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed Safest to Do Nothing Here, Says JPMorgan’s David Kelly
top_signals.summary: David Kelly, chief global strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, says there’s a good chance that May “will actually turn out to be the high-water mark for inflation in this cycle” as he examines what the CPI report means for Federal Reserve policy at the June meeting. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
